text: Wow, what an amazing turnout today for our Shih Tzu meet up in LA! Big shout out to @pawradise.park for hosting us and @littlemisseunie for organizing! It’s evident how much love we all have for our Shih Tzu’s 🥰 appreciate everyone for making the effort today, and if you weren’t able to join us today, the next meet up was just announced 👀
